ABS.description:
Function example: ABS(number) 
Function description: Get the absolute value of number

ADD.description:
Function example: ADD(A,B) 
Function description: Add A and B

ADD_DAY.description:
Function example: ADD_DAY(date,days) 
Function description: Add/subtract the specified number of days to the specified date, date is the specified date, and days is the specified number of days. When it is a negative number, subtract the number of days from the date.

ADD_MONTH.description:
Function example: ADD_MONTH(date, months)
Description: Add/subtract specified months to/from date, if negative, subtract months from date

ADD_WORK_DAY.displayName: Add or subtract working days (skip weekends)
ADD_WORK_DAY.description:
Function example: ADD_WORK_DAY(date, days)
Description: Add/subtract specified days to/from working days (skip weekends)

ADD_YEAR.description:
Function example: ADD_YEAR(date, years)
Description: Add/subtract specified years to/from date

AND.description:
Function example: AND(A,B) 
Function description: Returns the logical AND value of condition A and condition B

AVG.description:
Function example: AVG(collection) 
Function description: Returns the average value of the collection. The parameter collection is a collection or array.

BETWEEN_AND.description:
Function example: BETWEEN_AND(arg, 'a,b') 
Function description: Determine whether arg is between a and b (left closed, right closed)

CEIL.description:
Function example: CEIL(number) 
Function description: Round number up

CHECK_CHINESE.description:
Function example: CHECK_CHINESE(text)
Description: Validate if it matches Chinese rules

CHECK_CODE.description:
Function example: CHECK_CODE(text)
Description: Can only consist of English letters, numbers, and underscores

CHECK_CONTAINS_CHINESE.description:
Function example: CHECK_CONTAINS_CHINESE(text) 
Function description: Verify whether it contains Chinese rules

CHECK_EMAIL.description:
Function example: CHECK_EMAIL(text)
Description: Validate if it matches email rules

CHECK_ENG_NUM.description:
Function example: CHECK_ENG_NUM(text) 
Function description: Can only contain English and numbers

CHECK_ID_CARD.description:
Function example: CHECK_ID_CARD(text) 
Function description: Verify whether it complies with the rules of Chinese ID card

CHECK_INTEGER.description:
Function example: CHECK_INTEGER(text) 
Function description: Verify whether it conforms to the rules of integers

CHECK_IP.description:
Function example: CHECK_IP(text)
Description: IP address validation

CHECK_MAX_SIZE.description:
Function example: CHECK_MAX_SIZE(text)
Description: Enter at most m characters

CHECK_MIN_SIZE.description:
Function example: CHECK_MIN_SIZE(text)
Description: Enter at least m characters

CHECK_NUMBER.description:
Function example: CHECK_NUMBER(text)
Description: Validate if it matches number rules

CHECK_PHONE.description:
Function example: CHECK_PHONE(text) 
Function description: Verify whether it complies with the rules of mobile phone number

CHECK_PWD.description:
Function example: CHECK_PWD(text)
Description: Validate if it matches strong password rules

CHECK_SIZE.description:
Function example: CHECK_SIZE(text) 
Function description: Enter m characters

CHECK_SIZE_RANGE.description:
Function example: CHECK_SIZE_RANGE(text)
Description: Enter at most m characters

CHECK_TWO_DIG.displayName: Verify if there are two decimal places
CHECK_TWO_DIG.description:
Function example: CHECK_TWO_DIG(text) 
Function description: Verify whether there are two decimal places

CHECK_URL.description:
Function example: CHECK_URL(text)
Description: Validate if it matches URL rules

CHECK_USER_NAME.description:
Function example: CHECK_USER_NAME(text)
Description: Validate if it matches username rules

CONCAT.description:
Function example: CONCAT(list, split)
Description: Concatenate a string collection using separator, return concatenated string

CONTAINS.description:
Function example: CONTAINS(text, subtext)
Description: Check if text contains subtext, empty text is treated as empty string

COS.description:
Function example: COS(number) 
Function description: Take the cosine of number

COUNT.description:
Function example: COUNT(collection)
Description: Return total number of collection, collection is collection or array

COUNT_DAY.description:
Function example: COUNT_DAY(date1, date2)
Description: Calculate interval days between two dates, date1 - date2

CURRENT_CORP.description:
Function example: CURRENT_CORP() 
Function description: Get the current user’s company

CURRENT_CORP_ID.description:
Function example: CURRENT_CORP_ID()
Description: Get current user's company ID

CURRENT_DEPARTMENT.description:
Function example: CURRENT_DEPARTMENT()
Description: Get current user's department

CURRENT_DEPARTMENT_CODE.displayName: Get the current user department code
CURRENT_DEPARTMENT_CODE.description:
Function example: CURRENT_DEPARTMENT_CODE() 
Function description: Get the current user department code

CURRENT_PARTNER.description:
Function example: CURRENT_PARTNER() 
Function description: Get the current user’s partners

CURRENT_PARTNER_ID.displayName: Get the current user's partner id
CURRENT_PARTNER_ID.description:
Function example: CURRENT_PARTNER_ID() 
Function description: Get the partner id of the current user

CURRENT_ROLES.description:
Function example: CURRENT_ROLES()
Description: Get current user's role list

CURRENT_ROLE_IDS.displayName: Get the current user's role ID list
CURRENT_ROLE_IDS.description:
Function example: CURRENT_ROLE_IDS() 
Function description: Get the current user's role ID list

CURRENT_SHOP.description:
Function example: CURRENT_SHOP()
Description: Get current user's shop

CURRENT_SHOP_ID.displayName: Get the current user's store ID
CURRENT_SHOP_ID.description:
Function example: CURRENT_SHOP_ID() 
Function description: Get the current user’s store ID

CURRENT_UID.description:
Function example: CURRENT_UID()
Description: Get current user ID

CURRENT_USER.description:
Function example: CURRENT_USER() 
Function description: Get the current user

CURRENT_USER_NAME.description:
Function example: CURRENT_USER_NAME()
Description: Get current user's username

DATE_EQUALS.description:
Function example: DATE_EQUALS(date1,date2) 
Function description: Compare the size of two dates, return true when date1 == date2

DAY.description:
Function example: DAY(date) 
Function description: Extraction date

DIVIDE.description:
Function example: DIVIDE(A, B)
Description: Divide A by B

ENDS_WITH.displayName: Whether to end with the specified string
ENDS_WITH.description:
Function example: ENDS_WITH(text,start) 
Function description: Determine whether the text string text ends with the text string end. If the text is empty, it will be processed as an empty string.

EQUALS.description:
Function example: EQUALS(A,B) 
Function description: Determine whether A and B are equal

FIELD_GET.displayName: Get object property value by field code
FIELD_GET.description:
Function example: FIELD_GET(obj, model, dotExpression)
Description: Get property value from object by field code dot expression

FLOOR.description:
Function example: FLOOR(number)
Description: Round number down

GET.description:
Function example: GET(obj,dotExpression) 
Function description: Get attribute values from objects based on attribute point expressions

GREATER_EQUAL.description:
Function example: GREATER_EQUAL(date1,date2) 
Function description: Compare the size of two dates, return true when date1 >= date2

GREATER_THAN.description:
Function example: GREATER_THAN(date1,date2) 
Function description: Compare the size of two dates, return true when date1 > date2

IF.description:
Function example: IF(A,B,C) 
Function description: If IF meets condition A, it returns B, otherwise it returns C. It supports multi-level nested IF functions.

INDEXOF.description:
Function example: INDEXOF("a,b,c", "b") returns 1
Description: Return first occurrence of substring

IS_BLANK.displayName: Whether it is an empty string
IS_BLANK.description:
Function example: IS_BLANK(text) 
Function description: Determine whether the text string text is empty

IS_NULL.description:
Function example: IS_NULL(text or control)
Description: Check if text or control is empty, return true if empty, false if not

JOIN.description:
Function example: JOIN(text, join)
Description: Concatenate text string with join string, empty text is treated as empty string

JSON.description:
Function example: JSON(object)
Description: Serialize record object to JSON string

LEN.description:
Function example: LEN(text) 
Function description: Get the length of the text string text. When the text is empty, it will be processed as an empty string.

LESS_EQUAL.description:
Function example: LESS_EQUAL(date1,date2) 
Function description: Compare the size of two dates, return true when date1 <= date2

LESS_THAN.description:
Function example: LESS_THAN(date1, date2)
Description: Compare two dates, return true if date1 < date2

LIST_ADD.description:
Function example: LIST_ADD(list, item)
Description: Add element item to collection list

LIST_ADD_BY_INDEX.displayName: Adds an element to a collection (or array) at a specified position
LIST_ADD_BY_INDEX.description:
Function example: LIST_ADD_BY_INDEX(list,index,item) 
Function description: Add the element item to the index of the collection list

LIST_AND.displayName: Perform a logical AND operation on a Boolean set
LIST_AND.description:
Function example: LIST_AND(list) 
Function description: Perform a logical AND operation on a Boolean set and return a Boolean value

LIST_CONTAINS.displayName: Check if collection (or array) contains element
LIST_CONTAINS.description:
Function example: LIST_CONTAINS(list, item)
Description: Check if collection list contains element item

LIST_COUNT.displayName: Get the number of elements in a collection (or array)
LIST_COUNT.description:
Function example: LIST_COUNT(list)
Description: Pass an object collection, get the number of elements in the collection

LIST_FIELD_EQUALS.displayName: Determine the matching of attribute values ​​in an object collection (or array)
LIST_FIELD_EQUALS.description:
Function example: LIST_FIELD_EQUALS(list,model,field,value) 
Function description: Determine the matching of attribute values in the object collection (or array) and return a Boolean collection

LIST_FIELD_IN.displayName: Determine whether the attribute value in the object collection (or array) is in the specified collection (or array)
LIST_FIELD_IN.description:
Function example: LIST_FIELD_IN(list,model,field,list) 
Function description: Determine whether the attribute value in the object collection (or array) is in the specified collection (or array) and return a Boolean collection

LIST_FIELD_NOT_EQUALS.displayName: Determine attribute value mismatch in object collection (or array)
LIST_FIELD_NOT_EQUALS.description:
Function example: LIST_FIELD_NOT_EQUALS(list, model, field, value)
Description: Determine attribute value mismatch in object collection (or array), return boolean collection

LIST_FIELD_NOT_IN.displayName: Determine whether the attribute value in the object collection (or array) is not in the specified collection (or array)
LIST_FIELD_NOT_IN.description:
Function example: LIST_FIELD_NOT_IN(list,model,field,list) 
Function description: Determine whether the attribute value in the object collection (or array) is not in the specified collection (or array), and return a Boolean collection

LIST_FIELD_VALUES.displayName: Convert a collection of objects into a collection of properties
LIST_FIELD_VALUES.description:
Function example: LIST_FIELD_VALUES(list,model,field) 
Function description: Pass in a collection of objects, the model and attribute fields of the object, and return a collection of attribute values.

LIST_GET.description:
Function example: LIST_GET(list,index) 
Function description: Get the element whose index is the numeric index in the collection list

LIST_IDS.displayName: Get all ids in the collection
LIST_IDS.description:
Function example: LIST_IDS(list) 
Function description: Pass in a collection of objects and obtain a list of all IDs in the collection.

LIST_IS_EMPTY.displayName: Check if collection (or array) is empty
LIST_IS_EMPTY.description:
Function example: LIST_IS_EMPTY(list)
Description: Check if object collection is empty

LIST_OR.description:
Function example: LIST_OR(list) 
Function description: Perform a logical OR operation on a Boolean set and return a Boolean value

LIST_REMOVE.description:
Function example: LIST_REMOVE(list, item)
Description: Remove element item from collection list

LOG.description:
Function example: LOG(a, b) 
Function description: Calculate the logarithm with base b: log b(a)

LOWER.description:
Function example: LOWER(text) 
Function description: lowercase text string text

MAP_CONTAINS_KEY.displayName: Determine whether a key-value pair contains a key
MAP_CONTAINS_KEY.description:
Function example: MAP_CONTAINS_KEY(map,key) 
Function description: Determine whether the key-value pair map contains key key

MAP_COUNT.description:
Function example: MAP_COUNT(map)
Description: Get the number of key-value pairs in map

MAP_GET.displayName: Get value of specified key from key-value pair
MAP_GET.description:
Function example: MAP_GET(map, key)
Description: Get value with key from key-value pair

MAP_IS_EMPTY.displayName: Check if key-value pair is empty
MAP_IS_EMPTY.description:
Function example: MAP_IS_EMPTY(map)
Description: Check if key-value pair map is empty

MAP_PUT.description:
Function example: MAP_PUT(map,key,value) 
Function description: Add the key as key and the value as value to the key-value pair map

MAP_REMOVE.displayName: Remove elements from a key-value pair
MAP_REMOVE.description:
Function example: MAP_REMOVE(map,key) 
Function description: Remove the key key from the key-value pair map

MATCHES.description:
Function example: MATCHES(text, regex)
Description: Validate if string satisfies regular expression match, e.g., regex is [a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$

MAX.description:
Function example: MAX(collection) 
Function description: Returns the maximum value in the collection, the parameter collection is a collection or array

MIN.description:
Function example: MIN(collection) 
Function description: Returns the minimum value in the collection, the parameter collection is a collection or array

MOD.description:
Function example: MOD(A,B) 
Function description: A takes the remainder of B

MONTH.description:
Function example: MONTH(date)
Description: Extract month

MULTIPLY.description:
Function example: MULTIPLY(A,B) 
Function description: Multiply A and B

NNZ_SUBTRACT.description:
Function example: NNZ_SUBTRACT(A, B)
Description: Subtract B from A, if difference >= 0 use difference, if < 0 set to 0

NOT.description:
Function example: NOT(A) 
Function description: Returns the value of logical negation condition A

NOT_CONTAINS.description:
Function example: NOT_CONTAINS(text, subtext)
Description: Check if text does not contain subtext, empty text is treated as empty string

NOW.description:
Function example: NOW() 
Function description: Return the current time

NOW_STR.description:
Function example: NOW_STR() 
Function description: Returns the current time string, accurate to hours, minutes and seconds, in the format of yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss

OR.description:
Function example: OR(A,B) 
Function description: Returns the logical OR value of condition A and condition B

PARSE.description:
Function example: PARSE(text)
Description: Deserialize JSON text string to collection or map

PI.description:
Function example: PI() 
Function description: pi

POW.description:
Function example: POW(a, b) 
Function description: Calculate a raised to the power b

REPLACE.description:
Function example: REPLACE(text, oldtext, newtext)
Description: Replace oldtext with newtext in text

ROUND.description:
Function example: ROUND(number) 
Function description: Round number

SIN.description:
Function example: SIN(number) 
Function description: Take the sine of number

SPLIT.displayName: Split string into collection by separator
SPLIT.description:
Function example: SPLIT("a,b,c", ",") returns array ["a", "b", "c"]
Description: Split string into collection by separator

SQRT.description:
Function example: SQRT(number) 
Function description: Take the square root of number

STARTS_WITH.displayName: Whether to start with the specified string
STARTS_WITH.description:
Function example: STARTS_WITH(text,start) 
Function description: Determine whether the text string text starts with the text string start. If the text is empty, it will be processed as an empty string.

SUBSTRING.description:
Function example: SUBSTRING("Hello", 1, 3) returns "ell"
Description: Substring from specified position

SUBSTRING_END.displayName: Intercept the substring from the specified position to the end
SUBSTRING_END.description: Function example: SUBSTRING_END("Hello", 1) returns "ello" Function description: intercepts the substring from the specified position to the end

SUBTRACT.description:
Function example: SUBTRACT(A,B) 
Function description: Subtract A from B

SUB_DATETIME_TO_DDHHMMSS.displayName: Time subtraction (get: DD days HH hours MM minutes SS seconds)
SUB_DATETIME_TO_DDHHMMSS.description:
Function example: SUB_DATETIME_TO_DDHHMMSS(endDateTime, startDateTime)
Description: Subtract specified time to get DD days HH hours MM minutes SS seconds, endDateTime is end time, startDateTime is start time

SUB_DATETIME_TO_SECOND.description:
Function example: SUB_DATE_TO_SECOND(endDateTime, startDateTime)
Description: Subtract specified time to get seconds, endDateTime is end time, startDateTime is start time

SUM.description:
Function example: SUM(collection) 
Function description: Returns the sum of collections. The parameter collection is a collection or array.

TODAY_STR.description:
Function example: TODAY_STR() 
Function description: Returns today’s date string, accurate to the day, in the format of yyyy-MM-dd

TO_DATE.description:
Function example: TO_DATE(date,pattern) 
Function description: Convert date string to time according to format

TRIM.description:
Function example: TRIM(text)
Description: Remove leading and trailing spaces from text

UPPER.description:
Function example: UPPER(text)
Description: Uppercase text string

UPPER_MONEY.description:
Function example: UPPER_MONEY(number) 
Function description: Returns the upper case of the amount. The parameter number is a numerical value or a string of numerical type.

YEAR.description:
Function example: YEAR(date) 
Function description: Extract year
